ogTitle: Billa Billa vs Biloela: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Billa Billa and Biloela.
heading: Billa Billa vs Biloela — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Billa Billa, Queensland and Biloela, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Billa Billa has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Biloela (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Billa Billa or Biloela safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Billa Billa has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Biloela scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Billa Billa scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Biloela scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Billa Billa or Biloela?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Billa Billa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
